text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Butter, as opposed to oil gives better flavor to a fried egg.","claimType":"value","quote":"I think that butter, as opposed to oil gives better flavor to a fried egg.","entailment":"The speaker explicitly states that butter provides better flavor than oil when frying an egg.","population":"","intervention":"butter","comparator":"oil","outcome":"flavor of fried egg","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"},{"statement":"After 30 to 45 seconds of cooking, the egg whites on the outside become fully set and the yolk is perfect.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"After literally 30 to 45 seconds, you'll see that all the whites on the outside of our egg should be fully set, and that top yolk in the middle is perfect.","entailment":"The speaker reports that cooking for 30‑45 seconds results in fully set whites and a perfect yolk.","population":"egg","intervention":"cooking for 30 to 45 seconds","comparator":"","outcome":"whites set; yolk perfect","timeframe":"30 to 45 seconds","quantifiers":"30 to 45 seconds","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The scrambled‑egg method involves stirring for 30 seconds on the heat then 30 seconds off while keeping the flame on.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"The way it all happens from here is stirring 30s on the heat, then 30s off, but still keeping that flame on so we have it ready when we need to go back.","entailment":"The speaker describes the step‑by‑step procedure for scrambling eggs.","population":"","intervention":"stir 30 s on heat then 30 s off with flame on","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"30 s on, 30 s off","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Using a non‑stick pan is very important when making scrambled eggs.","claimType":"value","quote":"It's very important that you make sure the pan is nonstick.","entailment":"The speaker asserts the necessity of a non‑stick pan for scrambled eggs.","population":"","intervention":"non‑stick pan","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"}]}
